title: Tieks Giveaway CLOSED
excerpt: I have to admit, I had been hearing the hype about Tieks long before I actually took the plunge to purchase them. While at a City Year fundraiser event, I bid on an e-gift card and won. It turns out…
body: I have to admit, I had been hearing the hype about Tieks long before I actually took the plunge to purchase them. While at a City Year fundraiser event, I bid on an e-gift card and won. It turns out that the fashionable flats are well worth the hype - stylish, comfortable, they fold up and are fantastic for travel. I am now the proud owner of two pairs, purchased in just the past few months. The Wild Copper is pictured above. I collaborated with them on this photo:
